dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6755 IH: Accountable Leadership for Veterans Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Mace introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to relax restrictions on filling certain vacant positions at the Department of Veterans Affairs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Accountable Leadership for Veterans Act of 2025.

section.header: Senior Executive Service positions in the Department filled by noncareer appointees
section.text: Section 709(a)(1) of title 38, United States Code, is amended by striking 5 percent and inserting 10 percent.
Section 305 of title 38, United States Code, is amended to read as follows:
There is in the Department an Under Secretary for Health, who is appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.
Section 306 of title 38, United States Code, is amended to read as follows:
There is in the Department an Under Secretary for Benefits, who is appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.
